stages.label: Source Identified
stages.description: At least one potentially relevant source has been identified.
stages.minimum_support_expected: A source record with enough metadata to find the cited material again.
stages.common_overclaim_risk: Treating source existence as evidence of a conclusion.
stages.moves_to_next_stage: An extracted finding with a clear source link and context boundary.

stages.label: Finding Extracted
stages.description: A source-backed atomic finding has been extracted.
stages.minimum_support_expected: A finding record linked to a source and scoped to one taxonomy topic.
stages.common_overclaim_risk: Overgeneralizing one finding into a broader public claim.
stages.moves_to_next_stage: A support map that explains how the finding does or does not support a claim.

stages.label: Claim Supported
stages.description: A public claim is backed by a support map that cites concrete findings and sources.
stages.minimum_support_expected: A claim record with supporting_evidence entries mapped to findings and sources.
stages.common_overclaim_risk: Letting the claim exceed the support map.
stages.moves_to_next_stage: Independent review accepts source fidelity and interpretation.

stages.label: Reviewed Baseline
stages.description: Required appraisal lanes have accepted the bundle and the claim can be published.
stages.minimum_support_expected: Complete non-blocking evidence appraisals for required lanes.
stages.common_overclaim_risk: Mistaking editorial publication for permanent certainty.
stages.moves_to_next_stage: Review Update identifies a material update or stale coverage.
